final_answer: To reduce the risk of getting COVID-19, it is important to avoid crowded places and practice physical distancing of at least 1 metre, wear a mask in public places where physical distancing is not possible, wash your hands frequently with soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub, keep indoor spaces well ventilated, seek medical care early if experiencing symptoms, stay informed about COVID-19 updates and guidelines from health authorities, and get vaccinated to help reduce the spread of the virus.
